title: Fix the 3 failing tick-create-dialog tests
description:
Pre-existing: 3 of the 72 baseline UI failures are in internal/tickboard/ui/src/components/tick-create-dialog.test.ts. Diagnose by running pnpm test src/components/tick-create-dialog.test.ts and reading the errors; fix the tests (or the component, if the tests document intended behavior the component lost — justify in report). Do NOT touch src/comms/** (a parallel tick owns it).

Per project CLAUDE.md: pnpm only; ticks-* components; custom events bubbles+composed.

Run: cd internal/tickboard/ui && pnpm test src/components/tick-create-dialog.test.ts
acceptance_criteria: The 3 tests pass; full pnpm test shows no new failures; comms files untouched
closed_reason: 3 dialog tests fixed: rotted after manual-checkbox -> workflow-select refactor; tests updated to current component behavior, no component changes
